dashboard.show_display_hint: Open a floating mirror of the printer display
dashboard.swap_in_progress: An ACE swap is in progress — please wait until it completes.

config.swap_retract_length_hint: Used only during print-time color swaps. Recommended MVP default: 1800 mm; full unload uses the full unload retract length.
config.fa_load_disable: Disable feed-assist / ACE feed during load
config.mode_change_pending: Klipper restart required to apply mode change
config.update_intro: Pulls the latest multiACE release and installs it.
config.update_apply_msg: Downloads and installs {to} (currently: {from}). Klipper restarts afterwards. Make sure no print is running first.
config.debug_explain: Updates only survive the next reboot once persistent updates are enabled. To enable, run the command below over SSH and reboot.
config.debug_apply_locked_tip: Enable persistent updates first, otherwise this install gets wiped on the next reboot.
config.debug_disable_msg: Removes /oem/.debug. The next reboot will wipe /oem/overlay/upper - installed updates revert to whatever is baked into the firmware image. Use this to roll back a bad install.
config.debug_reboot_prompt: Debug mode is now ENABLED. Reboot once so the overlay-wipe is skipped from now on.
config.debug_reboot_msg: Sends /machine/reboot to Moonraker. Any running job is aborted.

dialog.load_already_loaded_msg:
T{slot} is currently loaded from ACE {src_ace} / Slot {src_slot}.
Choose how to proceed when loading from ACE {ace} / Slot {slot}.
dialog.unload_empty_msg:
T{slot} reports no filament. A second unload may push the spool out of the ACE slot too.
Continue?
dialog.switch_mode_msg: Mode switching is obsolete. Configure each toolhead source and ACE target from the dashboard topology controls, then apply topology.
dialog.apply_snapshot_msg:
The following actions will run in order:
1) Toolheads loaded from a different source will be unloaded
2) Per ACE: switch + load the requested toolheads
dialog.overwrite_snapshot_msg: Snapshot "{name}" will be replaced with the current toolhead state.
dialog.snapshot_warnings_hint: Apply anyway? The web UI will follow the actual loaded filament after the load.
dialog.picker_save_switch_hint: ACE {ace} is not active - will switch first.
dialog.picker_read_rfid_hint: Pull material, vendor and color from the slot's RFID tag

upload.tooltip: Upload a G-code file and start printing immediately
upload.title: G-code upload
upload.confirm_msg: Upload {name} ({size} MB) and start printing immediately?

preflight.title: G-code preflight
preflight.missing_mat_msg: The printer has no slot loaded for one or more materials the slicer needs. Load the missing material(s), then re-upload - until then no print options are offered.
preflight.skip_calibration: Skip bed leveling, flow calibration & timelapse
preflight.mvp_slicer_only: MVP hardware testing only supports current-layout printing.

queue.send_all_tooltip: Send all queued commands to the printer (UI can be closed afterwards)
queue.long_timeout: Command still has not finished after 20 minutes

msg.no_devices_after_wait: Found {count} of {expected} ACE devices after waiting; continuing - connect more by reconnecting them.
msg.feed_assist_disarmed: Feed assist disarmed on ACE {ace} slot {slot}
msg.feed_assist_armed: Feed assist armed on ACE {ace} slot {slot}
msg.usb_unstable: [multiACE] USB unstable, expected {expected} ACEs, found {count} - ACE inactive, Klipper continues. FIRMWARE_RESTART required after reconnecting.
msg.all_expected_found: [multiACE] All {expected} expected ACE device(s) found, canonical mapping locked
msg.no_ace_serial_configured: [multiACE] No ACE devices found and no serial configured - ACE inactive, Klipper continues
msg.open_ace_failed_attempts: [multiACE] Failed to open ACE {ace} at startup after {attempts} attempts
msg.not_all_aces_opened: [multiACE] Not all ACEs opened at startup - continuing with partial set
msg.print_start_head_needs_unavailable: [multiACE] WARNING: Head {head} needs ACE {ace} but only {count} ACE(s) available!
msg.print_start_head_needs_disconnected: [multiACE] WARNING: Head {head} needs ACE {ace} which is not connected!
msg.ghost_heads: [multiACE] GHOST HEAD(S): {heads} have filament at the toolhead sensor but no head_source mapping. ACE_SWAP_HEAD will be refused for these heads. Recover: ACEC__Unload_All, then load the target slot from the dashboard, then restart the print.
msg.print_start_fa_enabled: [multiACE] Print start: feed_assist enabled on ACE {ace} slot {slot} (head {head})
msg.cascade_detected: [multiACE] CASCADE detected: {count} ACEs failed in <1.5s (total cascades this session: {total})
msg.serial_write_recovered: [multiACE] ACE {ace} serial write recovered after reconnect
msg.fa_failed_final: [multiACE] FA start_feed_assist FAILED after {attempts} attempt(s) on ACE {ace} slot {slot}: code={code} msg={msg} - this lane will NOT be fed; check that filament is loaded into the ACE slot
msg.ace_stuck_powercycle: [multiACE] ACE {ace} stuck in status={status} after {attempts} reconnect attempts - aborting operation. Power-cycle the ACE.
msg.switch_in_progress: [multiACE] ACE switch already in progress, please wait
msg.ace_already_active_loading: [multiACE] ACE {ace} already active, loading available filaments...
msg.switch_extruder_full_unload: [multiACE] Extruder {head}: filament in head, full unload
msg.switch_extruder_skip_unload: [multiACE] Extruder {head}: not in head, skipping unload
msg.switch_extruder_already_loaded: [multiACE] Extruder {head}: filament already in head, skipping
msg.switch_extruder_no_filament: [multiACE] Extruder {head}: no filament in ACE, skipping
msg.ace_out_of_range_for_head: [multiACE] ACE {ace} out of range for head {head}
msg.load_head_already_loaded: [multiACE] Head {head} already has filament loaded. Unload first.
msg.load_head_inferred_only_ace: [multiACE] Head {head} already loaded, mapped to the only connected ACE / Slot {slot}
msg.load_head_no_source_recorded: [multiACE] Head {head} has filament but no head_source recorded. With {count} ACEs connected the source cannot be inferred safely. Run Unload All to clear all heads, then load fresh.
msg.load_slot_no_filament: [multiACE] ACE {ace} / Slot {slot} has no filament! Aborting load.
msg.unload_sensor_no_filament: [multiACE] Note: Sensor on head {head} not detecting filament (may be stationary)
msg.unload_head_no_mapping: [multiACE] Unloading head {head} (no ACE mapping, using active ACE)...
msg.unload_filament_still_detected: [multiACE] Warning: Filament still detected in head {head} after unload!
msg.test_cancelled: [multiACE] TEST CANCELLED by user - stopping after step {step}
msg.test_cancel_requested: [multiACE] TEST cancel requested - stopping after current step
msg.swap_refused_fa_load_disable: [multiACE] SWAP refused: ACE {ace} is in fa_load_disable. This ACE expects manual filament feed - swap not supported. Load head {head} manually instead.
msg.swap_complete: [multiACE] === Swap complete: Head {head} now on ACE {ace} / Slot {slot} ===
msg.usb_stats_summary: [multiACE] USB stats (uptime {uptime:.1f}min): errno5={errno5} (recovered={recovered}, lost={lost}), cascades={cascades}, connects={connects}, disconnects={disconnects}
msg.switching_ace_for_retract: [multiACE] Switching to ACE {ace} for head {head} retract...
msg.ace_failed_after_retries: [multiACE] Failed to connect to ACE {ace} after 5 retries, skipping head {head}
msg.no_filament_in_any_head: [multiACE] No filament detected in any head
msg.switched_to_mode: [multiACE] Switched to {mode} mode. No reboot needed.
msg.state_debug_status: [multiACE] State debug is {state} (gates state audit, telemetry, wiggle)
msg.fa_test_running: [ACE_FA_TEST] ACE={ace} scenario={scenario} slots={slots} delay={delay:.2f}s repeats={repeats} steps={steps} inter={inter:.2f}s retries={retries} retry_delay={retry_delay:.2f}s - running, watch klippy.log
